import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  for tok in tokens
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
  end

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0

  for n in nums
    if not has_prev or n != prev
      result = list.push(result, n)
      prev = n
      has_prev = true
    end
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for v in result
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end

  print("#{out}\n")
  Ok(())
end
